subject: A store for Advanced SimRacing inside Simracing.Fan
corpo:
Hi,

I'm Fabio, founder of Simracing.Fan and a simracer myself. Looking for brands that fit the project, I came across Advanced SimRacing. If you'd rather not hear from us, just say so and I'll stop. If you prefer, you can simply follow our progress through our partner mailing list: https://simracing.fan/partner

We're building the place where a simracer spends time off-track: community, marketplace and more in one portal. It's still under construction, so look past today's design and picture what it becomes for the whole community. Brands who move early can be among the first with a store inside it.

A new store takes work to set up, so we handle the whole onboarding for you. It's normally paid, but free for the first stores, in return for a small joint push to your audience (for example, inviting your followers to review your products). The early stores live here: https://simracing.fan/store

If this sounds right, the easiest first step is to create your account on the platform. Then just reply and tell me whether you'd like to open your own store, or see a demo store we can put together for you.

Fabio Ciaccio
Founder @ Simracing.Fan
#WhereDriversConnect
fabio@simracing.fan
simracing.fan
note: Outbound shopify-marketplace | company_id: 428330310842 | domain: advancedsimracing.com | product_category: vendor-ecommerce | store_url: https://www.advancedsimracing.com/ | recipient_language: EN | feed_importable: true | email: info@advancedsimracing.com
